title: Blue sauce
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Otheruses|Blue}} {{Food |image=[[File:Blue_sauce.gif]] |name=Blue sauce |origin= |date= |race= |creator= |found=[[Sullustan/Legends|Sullust]]{{JournalCite|11|Bungo n' Rusti Get Carry-Out}} |type= |description= |animals= |plants= |other= |edible=*[[Human/Legends|Humans]] *[[Sullustan/Legends|Sullustans]] |inedible= |potable= |nutrition= |effects=Instantly kills [[Giant Amorphous Bantha Breakfast Biscuit]]s |dishes=[[Bantha Breakfast Biscuit]] |affiliation=[[Biscuit Baron]] }} {{Quote|Captain Wankle, we found nothing out of the ordinary except several crates of Bantha Breakfast Biscuits.''"
"''Blue sauce?''"
"''Plenty, Sir!''"
"''Inform the men there'll be a special meal tonight!|A [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtrooper]] and [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Wankle]], discussing the cargo of the ''[[Chubby Gundark]]''|}} '''Blue sauce''' was a condiment that was often used on [[Bantha Breakfast Biscuit]]s. Blue sauce was also the only known way to destroy a [[Giant Amorphous Bantha Breakfast Biscuit]]. {{Food-stub}} ==Appearances== *{{JournalCite|11|Bungo n' Rusti Get Carry-Out}} {{1st}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} [[Category:Fast food]] [[Category:Sauces]]
